title: Project Wither Storm with Gun
body:
Modpack Description:

Prepare yourself for a brutal survival experience where modern firepower clashes with an unstoppable force of destruction. In this modpack, players face the legendary Wither Storm Boss, a colossal entity that devours the world block by block, growing stronger with every moment.

Unlike traditional Minecraft combat, this modpack introduces a wide arsenal of firearms—assault rifles, sniper rifles, shotguns, heavy machine guns, and explosive weaponry—allowing players to fight back with modern tactics against an ancient, godlike threat. Every bullet counts as the battlefield collapses around you, pulled into the Wither Storm’s gravitational chaos.

The atmosphere is dark, oppressive, and apocalyptic. Purple energy pierces the sky, debris floats through violent storms, and the roar of the Wither Storm echoes across ruined landscapes. Survival demands strategy, teamwork, resource management, and precision shooting.

This is not just a boss fight—it is a war against extinction.
Stand your ground, lock and load, and challenge the ultimate embodiment of destruction.
